title: Unique AI Dedicated Chart Values
description: Shared schema for dedicated Helm charts based on the base library chart. Validates critical fields; overlay keys are permitted without restriction.

nameOverride.description: Override the name of the chart

fullnameOverride.description: Override the full name of the chart

selectorComponentLabel.description: Value for the app.kubernetes.io/component label in selector and pod template labels. Do not change after first deployment — Kubernetes Deployment selectors are immutable.

replicaCount.description: Number of replicas for the deployment

tag.description: Container image tag. Omit to use appVersion from Chart.yaml.

digest.description: Container image digest (sha256). Stamped by helm-chart-publish at release time. When useDigest is true the kubelet pulls by this digest; the tag is kept only for human readability. Never reference this from a label.

useDigest.description: When true, render container image as repository:tag@sha256:digest (kubelet pulls by digest). When false, render as repository:tag (digest field is ignored even if present). Default in source values.yaml is false; helm-chart-publish flips it to true at release time alongside stamping image.digest. Customers can opt out of digest enforcement by overriding this back to false in their cluster overlay.

env.description: Environment variables rendered into a ConfigMap and mounted into the container. Each value is a plain string (tpl-evaluated), a number/boolean (converted to string as-is), or an object with 'value' (tpl expression to emit) and optional 'if' (tpl expression; key is omitted when result is '' or 'false'). Prefer quoting numeric values in YAML to keep types explicit.

value.description: The env var value as a tpl expression.

if.description: tpl expression controlling emission. Key is omitted when result is '' or 'false'.

envSecrets.description: Environment variables rendered into a Secret (base64-encoded). Use for values you do not want in the ConfigMap.

envVars.description: Additional environment variables in native Kubernetes syntax (e.g. valueFrom secretKeyRef).

extraEnvCM.description: Names of existing ConfigMaps to mount as environment variables

extraEnvSecrets.description: Names of existing Secrets to mount as environment variables

application.description: Container port. Sets the PORT env var and containerPort in the Deployment.

metrics.description: Optional dedicated metrics port. Disabled when not set.

routes.description: Gateway API HTTPRoute configuration. Routes are only rendered when routes.hostname is set.

hostname.description: Hostname for the HTTPRoute. Must be set in each environment overlay — the chart default is a {{ fail }} sentinel that aborts render if not overridden.

pathPrefix.description: URL path prefix applied to all paths in this chart

timeout.description: Request timeout for all routes, e.g. 60s

jwt.description: Enable JWT validation on the route

gateway.description: Reference to the parent Gateway resource

extraRoutes.description: Additional HTTPRoutes beyond the main route, keyed by name

prometheus.description: Prometheus monitoring configuration. All resources render by default when the monitoring.coreos.com/v1 CRD is available; opt out via prometheus.enabled: false.

enabled.description: Defaults to true. Set false to opt out of all Prometheus resources (ServiceMonitor, PodMonitor, PrometheusRule).
Defaults to true; set false to opt out of this alert group.

additionalLabels.description: Routing labels applied to argocd alert rules; overrides defaultAlerts.additionalLabels

enabled.description: Defaults to true; set false to opt out of this alert group.

additionalLabels.description: Routing labels applied to kubernetesApplication alert rules; overrides defaultAlerts.additionalLabels

enabled.description: Defaults to true; set false to opt out of this alert group.

additionalLabels.description: Routing labels applied to kubernetesResources alert rules; overrides defaultAlerts.additionalLabels
Extra labels applied to all default alert rules, e.g. team routing labels

additionalAlerts.description: Chart-specific PrometheusRule entries, keyed by alert name

additionalLabels.description: Routing labels applied to all custom alert rules; overrides defaultAlerts.additionalLabels

additionalRules.description: Additional raw Prometheus recording or alerting rules

targetCPUUtilizationPercentage.description: Target CPU utilization percentage for HPA

targetMemoryUtilizationPercentage.description: Target memory utilization percentage for HPA

triggers.description: KEDA triggers. Either a list of trigger objects or a map of named triggers.

resources.description: Container CPU/memory resource requests and limits

podLabels.description: Extra labels added to every pod

podAnnotations.description: Extra annotations added to every pod

probes.description: Kubernetes liveness, readiness and startup probe configuration

maxUnavailable.description: Maximum number of unavailable pods during voluntary disruptions

minAvailable.description: Minimum number of available pods during voluntary disruptions

secretProvider.description: Azure Key Vault secret provider configuration. When tenantId or useVMManagedIdentity are set, vaults are required.

vaults.description: Map of Key Vault names to env-var-to-secret-name mappings

rollingUpdate.description: RollingUpdate strategy parameters. Only applied when strategy.type is RollingUpdate.

minReadySeconds.description: Minimum number of seconds a newly created pod must be ready before it is considered available

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: Override the pod termination grace period in seconds

hooks.description: Pre/post-install Helm hook jobs, keyed by hook name (e.g. migration, seed). Top-level boolean and object properties (e.g. enabled, image, resources) are also supported as shared defaults applied to all hook jobs.

cronJobs.description: Map of named CronJob configurations (base multi-cronjob pattern)

extraCronJobs.description: Additional named CronJobs beyond the primary cronJob

matchLabels.description: Pod selector labels for kube-dns. Default: {k8s:k8s-app: kube-dns}.

ports.description: DNS port list. Default: [{port: "53", protocol: UDP}, {port: "53", protocol: TCP}].

matchPatterns.description: DNS match patterns for toPorts.rules.dns[]. Default: ["*"] (all domains).

matchLabels.description: Pod selector labels for Prometheus. Default: {k8s:app.kubernetes.io/name: prometheus}. Port is derived from ports.metrics when set, else the application port.

types.description: ICMPv4 type names or numbers accepted by Cilium.
ICMPv6 type names or numbers accepted by Cilium. Default covers Neighbor/Router Discovery, MLD, and diagnostics.

entities.description: Cilium entity names to allow ingress from. Default: [world].

port.description: Start of the ephemeral port range. Default: 32768 (Linux default).

endPort.description: End of the ephemeral port range (inclusive). Default: 60999 (Linux default).

protocol.description: Protocol for the ephemeral port range.

internalServices.description: Symmetric in-cluster service-to-service traffic declarations. Each chart declares both the services it calls (dependencies) and the services that call it (dependents). Map keys are arbitrary logical names; values are per-entry descriptors.

dependencies.description: Map of logical name to dependency descriptor. One entry per service this chart calls.

dependents.description: Map of logical name to dependent descriptor. One entry per service that calls this chart.

volumeMounts.description: Volume mounts for the main container

extraManifests.description: Additional raw Kubernetes manifests to include

grafana.description: Grafana dashboard ConfigMap provisioning. Place dashboard JSON files under files/grafana/dashboards/ in the consuming chart.

enabled.description: When true, one ConfigMap is created per JSON file under files/grafana/dashboards/. Defaults to false.

folder.description: Grafana folder for provisioned dashboards (ConfigMap annotation grafana_folder). Defaults to apps.

replacements.description: Map of placeholder to resolved datasource UID. Dashboard JSON files should use %%PLACEHOLDER%% markers (e.g. %%PROMETHEUS_UID%%) instead of hardcoded UIDs. Each entry replaces a marker with the actual UID before the ConfigMap is rendered. The dedicated chart sets defaults; customer overlays override per tenant.

global.description: Global values merged into all subcharts

registry.description: Global registry override — takes precedence over image.registry in all charts. Use uniqueapp.azurecr.io to revert to the legacy registry without modifying chart code.

postgresql.description: PostgreSQL external service contract. When enabled, injects POSTGRESQL_* env vars and DATABASE_URL. CNP egress shape is determined by connection.host source kind.

networkPolicyEgressManaged.description: Set to true when connection.url or an opaque host is used and networkPolicy is enabled. Suppresses the render-time fail; you must define the egress rule in networkPolicy.egress[] yourself.

host.description: Required when enabled. Source kind determines CNP egress: literal → toFQDNs, fromKubernetesService → toEndpoints, opaque → soft-skip.

port.description: PostgreSQL port. Defaults to 5432 when host uses a non-KSvc source.

sslMode.description: One of: disable | allow | prefer | require | verify-ca | verify-full | verify

password.description: Sensitive. Accepts only fromSecret or fromSecretProvider.

url.description: Sensitive full DSN. When set, DATABASE_URL is injected directly; individual POSTGRESQL_* fields are still emitted for convenience.

envVarNames.description: Optional override of canonical env-var names.

redis.description: Redis external service contract. Non-cluster: PUBSUB_REDIS_{HOST,PORT,...}. Cluster: PUBSUB_REDIS_CLUSTER_{MODE,NODES,...}.

networkPolicyEgressManaged.description: Set to true when an opaque host is used and networkPolicy is enabled. Suppresses the render-time fail; you must define the egress rule in networkPolicy.egress[] yourself.

password.description: Sensitive. Accepts only fromSecret or fromSecretProvider.

clusterMode.description: When true, emit PUBSUB_REDIS_CLUSTER_* vars instead of PUBSUB_REDIS_*.

clusterNodes.description: Explicit seed-node list. When present in cluster mode, builds PUBSUB_REDIS_CLUSTER_NODES. All entries use connection.port as the dial port.

envVarNames.description: Optional override of canonical env-var names.

rabbitmq.description: RabbitMQ external service contract. URL mode: AMQP_URL via secretKeyRef. Structured mode: AMQP_{HOST,PORT,VHOST,USERNAME,PASSWORD}.

networkPolicyEgressManaged.description: Set to true when connection.url or an opaque host is used and networkPolicy is enabled. Suppresses the render-time fail; you must define the egress rule in networkPolicy.egress[] yourself.

password.description: Sensitive. Accepts only fromSecret or fromSecretProvider.

url.description: Sensitive full AMQP URL. When set, AMQP_URL is injected directly.

envVarNames.description: Optional override of canonical env-var names.

elasticsearch.description: Elasticsearch external service contract. URL mode: ELASTICSEARCH_URL directly. Structured mode: ELASTICSEARCH_{SCHEME,HOST,PORT} + $(VAR)-composed URL.

networkPolicyEgressManaged.description: Set to true when connection.url or an opaque host is used and networkPolicy is enabled. Suppresses the render-time fail; you must define the egress rule in networkPolicy.egress[] yourself.

host.description: Required in structured mode (when url is absent).

scheme.description: http or https. Defaults to https.

password.description: Sensitive. Accepts only fromSecret or fromSecretProvider.

url.description: Sensitive full URL. When set, ELASTICSEARCH_URL is injected directly.

caBundle.description: CA bundle Secret for TLS verification. Drives ELASTICSEARCH_CA_BUNDLE and auto-generates volume + volumeMount.

envVarNames.description: Optional override of canonical env-var names.

googleSearch.description: Google Search configuration. Generated from _GoogleCredentials (GOOGLE_SEARCH_* env vars).

braveSearch.description: Brave Search configuration. Generated from _BraveCredentials (BRAVE_SEARCH_* env vars).

perplexitySearch.description: Perplexity Search configuration. Generated from _PerplexityCredentials (PERPLEXITY_SEARCH_* env vars).

bingAgent.description: Bing Agent configuration. Generated from _BingAgentCredentials (BING_AGENT_* env vars).

vertexaiAgent.description: VertexAI Agent configuration. Generated from _VertexAIAgentCredentials (VERTEXAI_AGENT_* env vars).

tavily.description: Tavily configuration. Generated from _TavilyCredentials (TAVILY_* env vars).

jina.description: Jina configuration. Generated from _JinaCredentials (JINA_* env vars).

firecrawl.description: Firecrawl configuration. Generated from _FirecrawlCredentials (FIRECRAWL_* env vars).

httpClient.description: HTTP Client configuration. Generated from HttpClientSettings (HTTP_CLIENT_* env vars).

urlSafety.description: URL Safety configuration. Generated from UrlSafetySettings (URL_SAFETY_* env vars).

internalServiceDependency.description: A service this chart calls (outbound dependency). Used to build the service URL and to generate pod-selector egress rules in Cilium network policies.

name.description: Kubernetes Service name; used as the default app.kubernetes.io/name pod selector label value when podSelectorLabels is omitted.

namespace.description: Namespace the peer Service lives in.

servicePort.description: The Kubernetes Service port the app dials. Used to build http://<name>.<namespace>.svc.cluster.local:<servicePort><basePath>.

podPort.description: The container port Cilium toPorts matches on the pod-selector egress rule. Defaults to servicePort when omitted — set explicitly only when Service targetPort != containerPort.

basePath.description: Optional path suffix appended to the service URL.

podSelectorLabels.description: Pod selector labels for Cilium egress rules to this dependency. When networkPolicy.flavor is cilium, keys must use the k8s: source prefix (e.g. k8s:app.kubernetes.io/name). Defaults to { app.kubernetes.io/name: <name> }.

enabled.description: Controls whether this dependency is active. Referenced by env[*].if template expressions to conditionally emit the corresponding env var.

internalServiceDependent.description: A service that calls this chart (inbound caller). Used by the CNP generator (Phase 3) for pod-selector ingress rules.

name.description: Kubernetes Service name of the calling service; used as the default app.kubernetes.io/name pod selector label value when podSelectorLabels is omitted.

namespace.description: Namespace the calling service lives in.

podSelectorLabels.description: Pod selector labels for Cilium ingress rules from this caller. When networkPolicy.flavor is cilium, keys must use the k8s: source prefix. Defaults to { app.kubernetes.io/name: <name> }.

podPorts.description: Listener pod ports on THIS chart that the caller hits. Defaults to [{ port: ports.application, protocol: TCP }] when omitted. No servicePort here — Cilium ingress matches the destination Pod's container port, not the Service VIP port.

endPort.description: Inclusive upper bound for a port range. When set, port is the lower bound.

enabled.description: Controls whether this dependent's ingress rule is emitted. Absent means true.

_fromKubernetesServiceRef.description: In-cluster Kubernetes Service descriptor. The helper resolves the host literal to <name>.<namespace>.svc.cluster.local AND feeds CNP pod-selector egress. Set connection.port for the dial port. The CIDR-fallback hack for evicted-pod identity loss is NOT part of this shape; charts that need it declare an explicit networkPolicy.egress[] entry.

podPort.description: The container port Cilium toPorts matches on the pod-selector egress rule.

podSelectorLabels.description: Keys must include the k8s: source prefix. Defaults to { k8s:app.kubernetes.io/name: <name> } when omitted.

skipClusterDomain.description: When true, resolves the host to <name>.<namespace>.svc instead of the full .svc.cluster.local FQDN. Set this only when the target service's TLS certificate does not include the cluster.local suffix in its SANs (e.g. ECK auto-generated Elasticsearch HTTP certificates).

valueSourceString.description: String-typed value source: bare shorthand or one of the four standard sources.

valueSourceInteger.description: Integer-typed value source: bare integer shorthand or one of the four standard sources.

valueSourceBoolean.description: Boolean-typed value source: bare boolean shorthand or one of the four standard sources.

valueSourceHost.description: Host-typed value source: string shorthand or one of the five sources (includes fromKubernetesService for in-cluster Services).

valueSourceSensitive.description: Sensitive value source: only fromSecret or fromSecretProvider. Bare-string, value:, and fromConfigMap: are deliberately absent to prevent plain-text secrets in values.yaml.

valueSourceCaBundle.description: CA-bundle source: sensitive source (fromSecret or fromSecretProvider) plus a sibling mountPath. The helper auto-generates volumes and volumeMounts from mountPath.

mountPath.description: Container file path at which the helper mounts the CA Secret. Drives ELASTICSEARCH_CA_BUNDLE env and auto-generated volumes/volumeMounts.
